name: No nut November is over!! Celebrate! Your wife is so proud of you! Your friend came over to Celebrate your victory!!
description:
Please ignore/Block me/block the bot/Block the tag, if these themes upset you in real life. No need to get mad/angry. THANKS!

Don't be mad at me!! You won! Paul the first loser of the month Came over to celebrate your win! Your wife is so proud of you!

NTR may have happened, just move on if you get offended by it. This is just a thought I had, its make believe! NOTHING IS REAL!! This is just a bot. So relax, don't play it if you can't handle it! Its just a silly scenario!

NO-NTR VERSION!! https://janitorai.com/characters/2ff1ac0a-083c-4def-a19b-65620a88fb9a_character-its-your-birthday-celebrate-your-wife-is-so-happy-for-you-your-friends-came-over-to-celebrate-your-birthday

'You can't control how people react to your art, but you can control your reaction to their reaction.' — Roy T. Bennett
creator: NTRcuckathon
